case_title: RIDDIOUGH, NANCY VS MODJABI, ARAM IND/DBA THE ART OF MOTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RIDDIOUGH, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT MODJABI, ARAM IND/DBA THE ART OF MOTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MODJABI, ARAM IND/DBA THE ART OF MOTION
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-19-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-09-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED POS AS TO DEFT ARAM MODJABI FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIDDIOUGH, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODJABI, ARAM IND/DBA THE ART OF MOTION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
